Container.Name: unstuckarr
Container.Overview: Unstuckarr automatically detects and removes stuck downloads from your Sonarr/Radarr queue when using RDT-client with Real-Debrid. Features a web UI with live logs, history, and configurable detection thresholds. All connection settings (ARR hosts, API keys, RDT credentials) are configured via the Settings UI after first start — no environment variables required.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Unstuckarr web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database. All settings (including connection config) are stored here.
